race.comment: Another open race but SCOOBARTIE (5) looked good winning his maiden last time out at Bendigo, heavily supported and coming right away to score by three lengths. Relished a soft 6 there so conditions should be fine and he can go on with it now. FROSTED IN TIME (3) resumes. He was racing quite well last time in and did run third to a smart one in Vangogh Bankcheque when fresh last campaign. He should be ready to run well. LONSTAR (10) is a lightly raced 3yo who wasn't far away first up at Pakenham Synthetic and is expected to improve quickly, although heavy is an unknown. MEISHO (4) struggled on synthetic last time but had been going well enough prior - back to turf suits much better. FOREVER WITH NED (8) struggled in town last time but did win well on very heavy going two back and that reads well.
